diffs.before:
# ================================
# 多阶段构建 Dockerfile
# Nuxt (Static) + Spring Boot
# Node 24 + JDK 25
# ================================

# -------------------- 阶段 1: 构建前端 --------------------
FROM node:24-alpine AS frontend-builder

WORKDIR /frontend

# 复制依赖描述文件，提高缓存效率
COPY web/package.json web/pnpm-lock.yaml ./

ARG NPM_REGISTRY=https://registry.npmmirror.com
RUN npm config set registry ${NPM_REGISTRY} \
    && npm install -g pnpm@10.26.0 \
    && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

# 复制前端源码
COPY web/ ./

# 生成纯静态文件（ssr: false）
RUN pnpm run generate


# -------------------- 阶段 2: 构建后端 --------------------
FROM gradle:jdk25-alpine AS backend-builder

WORKDIR /backend

# 复制 Gradle 配置与源码（利用缓存）
COPY server/gradle ./gradle
COPY server/gradlew .
COPY server/gradlew.bat .
COPY server/build.gradle.kts .
COPY server/settings.gradle.kts .

# 预解析依赖，加速构建（允许失败以便无网络时仍能继续）
RUN ./gradlew dependencies --no-daemon || true

# 复制后端源码
COPY server/ ./

# 构建 Spring Boot 可执行 JAR
RUN ./gradlew bootJar --no-daemon


# -------------------- 阶段 3: 运行时镜像 --------------------
FROM eclipse-temurin:25-jdk-noble AS runtime

ENV TZ=Asia/Shanghai

# 安装运行依赖
RUN apt-get update \
 && apt-get install -y nginx supervisor wget tzdata \
 && ln -snf /usr/share/zoneinfo/$TZ /etc/localtime \
 && echo $TZ > /etc/timezone \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# 复制后端 JAR（Spring Boot 默认输出到 build/libs/*.jar）
COPY --from=backend-builder /backend/build/libs/*.jar /app/app.jar

# 复制前端静态资源（Nuxt generate 输出到 .output/public）
COPY --from=frontend-builder /frontend/.output/public /usr/share/nginx/html

# 创建必要目录
RUN mkdir -p /app/data /app/logs \
    && rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default \
    && rm -f /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf

# 复制 Nginx & Supervisor 配置
COPY docker/nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/app.conf
COPY docker/supervisord.conf /etc/supervisord.conf

EXPOSE 80 8080

# 应用参数（与 application.yaml 一致；使用 docker-compose 时会被覆盖）
ENV DB_HOST=localhost \
    DB_PORT=3306 \
    DB_NAME=entire-dashboard \
    DB_USERNAME=root \
    DB_PASSWORD=root \
    REDACTED \
    APP_USERNAME=admin \
    APP_PASSWORD=admin \
    JAVA_OPTS="-XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75 -XX:+UseZGC"

# 健康检查（通过 Nginx 访问前端页）
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=60s --retries=3 \
    CMD wget -q -O - http://localhost:80/ || exit 1

# 启动 Supervisor 管理 Nginx + Spring Boot
CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisord.conf"]
diffs.after:
# ================================
# Multi-stage Dockerfile
# Nuxt (Static) + Spring Boot
# Node 24 + JDK 25
# ================================

# -------------------- Stage 1: Build Frontend --------------------
FROM node:24-alpine AS frontend-builder

WORKDIR /frontend

# Copy dependency files for better caching
COPY web/package.json web/pnpm-lock.yaml ./

ARG NPM_REGISTRY=https://registry.npmmirror.com
RUN npm config set registry ${NPM_REGISTRY} \
    && npm install -g pnpm@10.26.0 \
    && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

# Copy frontend source code
COPY web/ ./

# Generate static files (ssr: false)
RUN pnpm run generate


# -------------------- Stage 2: Build Backend --------------------
FROM gradle:jdk25-alpine AS backend-builder

WORKDIR /backend

# Copy Gradle config and source (use cache)
COPY server/gradle ./gradle
COPY server/gradlew .
COPY server/gradlew.bat .
COPY server/build.gradle.kts .
COPY server/settings.gradle.kts .

# Pre-resolve dependencies to speed up build (allow failure for offline builds)
RUN ./gradlew dependencies --no-daemon || true

# Copy backend source code
COPY server/ ./

# Build Spring Boot executable JAR
RUN ./gradlew bootJar --no-daemon


# -------------------- Stage 3: Runtime Image --------------------
FROM eclipse-temurin:25-jdk-noble AS runtime

ENV TZ=Asia/Shanghai

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update \
 && apt-get install -y nginx supervisor wget tzdata \
 && ln -snf /usr/share/zoneinfo/$TZ /etc/localtime \
 && echo $TZ > /etc/timezone \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy backend JAR (Spring Boot outputs to build/libs/*.jar by default)
COPY --from=backend-builder /backend/build/libs/*.jar /app/app.jar

# Copy frontend static files (Nuxt generate outputs to .output/public)
COPY --from=frontend-builder /frontend/.output/public /usr/share/nginx/html

# Create required directories
RUN mkdir -p /app/data /app/logs \
    && rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default \
    && rm -f /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf

# Copy Nginx & Supervisor config
COPY docker/nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/app.conf
COPY docker/supervisord.conf /etc/supervisord.conf

EXPOSE 80 8080

# Application parameters (consistent with application.yaml; overridden when using docker-compose)
ENV DB_HOST=localhost \
    DB_PORT=3306 \
    DB_NAME=entire-dashboard \
    DB_USERNAME=root \
    DB_PASSWORD=root \
    REDACTED \
    APP_USERNAME=admin \
    APP_PASSWORD=admin \
    JAVA_OPTS="-XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75 -XX:+UseZGC"

# Health check (access frontend via Nginx)
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=60s --retries=3 \
    CMD wget -q -O - http://localhost:80/ || exit 1

# Start Supervisor to manage Nginx + Spring Boot
CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisord.conf"]

services:
  mysql:
    image: mysql:8.0
    container_name: entire-dashboard-mysql
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: root123456
      MYSQL_DATABASE: entire-dashboard
      TZ: Asia/Shanghai
    command:
      - --character-set-server=utf8mb4
      - --collation-server=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
      - --default-authentication-plugin=mysql_native_password
      - --max_connections=50
    ports:
      - "3381:3306"
    volumes:
      - ./data/mysql:/var/lib/mysql
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost", "-uroot", "-proot123456"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  entire-dashboard:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    image: ghcr.io/sunmh207/ entire-dashboard:0.1.0
    container_name: entire-dashboard
    ports:
      - "81:80"
    environment:
      DB_HOST: mysql
      DB_PORT: "3306"
      DB_NAME: entire-dashboard
      DB_USERNAME: root
      DB_PASSWORD: root123456
      JWT_SECRET: ChangeThisSecretKeyInProduction
      APP_USERNAME: admin
      APP_PASSWORD: admin
      JAVA_OPTS: -Xms256m -Xmx512m
    volumes:
      - ./data:/app/data
      - ./logs:/app/logs
    depends_on:
      mysql:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: unless-stopped

# ================================
# Multi-stage Dockerfile
# Nuxt (Static) + Spring Boot
# Node 24 + JDK 25
# ================================

# -------------------- Stage 1: Build Frontend --------------------
FROM node:24-alpine AS frontend-builder

WORKDIR /frontend

# Copy dependency files for better caching
COPY web/package.json web/pnpm-lock.yaml ./

ARG NPM_REGISTRY=https://registry.npmmirror.com
RUN npm config set registry ${NPM_REGISTRY} \
    && npm install -g pnpm@10.26.0 \
    && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

# Copy frontend source code
COPY web/ ./

# Generate static files (ssr: false)
RUN pnpm run generate


# -------------------- Stage 2: Build Backend --------------------
FROM gradle:jdk25-alpine AS backend-builder

WORKDIR /backend

# Copy Gradle config and source (use cache)
COPY server/gradle ./gradle
COPY server/gradlew .
COPY server/gradlew.bat .
COPY server/build.gradle.kts .
COPY server/settings.gradle.kts .

# Pre-resolve dependencies to speed up build (allow failure for offline builds)
RUN ./gradlew dependencies --no-daemon || true

# Copy backend source code
COPY server/ ./

# Build Spring Boot executable JAR
RUN ./gradlew bootJar --no-daemon


# -------------------- Stage 3: Runtime Image --------------------
FROM eclipse-temurin:25-jdk-noble AS runtime

ENV TZ=Asia/Shanghai

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update \
 && apt-get install -y nginx supervisor wget tzdata \
 && ln -snf /usr/share/zoneinfo/$TZ /etc/localtime \
 && echo $TZ > /etc/timezone \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy backend JAR (Spring Boot outputs to build/libs/*.jar by default)
COPY --from=backend-builder /backend/build/libs/*.jar /app/app.jar

# 复制前端静态资源（Nuxt generate 输出到 .output/public）
COPY --from=frontend-builder /frontend/.output/public /usr/share/nginx/html

# 创建必要目录
RUN mkdir -p /app/data /app/logs \
    && rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default \
    && rm -f /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf

# 复制 Nginx & Supervisor 配置
COPY docker/nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/app.conf
COPY docker/supervisord.conf /etc/supervisord.conf

EXPOSE 80 8080

# 应用参数（与 application.yaml 一致；使用 docker-compose 时会被覆盖）
ENV DB_HOST=localhost \
    DB_PORT=3306 \
    DB_NAME=entire-dashboard \
    DB_USERNAME=root \
    DB_PASSWORD=root \
    REDACTED \
    APP_USERNAME=admin \
    APP_PASSWORD=admin \
    JAVA_OPTS="-XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75 -XX:+UseZGC"

# 健康检查（通过 Nginx 访问前端页）
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=60s --retries=3 \
    CMD wget -q -O - http://localhost:80/ || exit 1

# 启动 Supervisor 管理 Nginx + Spring Boot
CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisord.conf"]

# Entire Dashboard A web-based analytics and visualization dashboard for data generated by [`entireio/cli`](https://github.com/entireio/cli). **Supported platforms:** GitLab, GitHub, and Gitee. ### System Architecture

Overall workflow: capturing conversations and events from the CLI, processing and storing them in MySQL through the core service, then visual analysis through the Dashboard. ## 🔧 Installation & Run ### 0. Install Entire CLI 本看板依赖 Entire CLI 产生的数据。请先从 [官网](https://entire.io/home) 安装 Entire CLI： ```bash curl -fsSL https://entire.io/install.sh | bash ``` 安装后，在目标仓库中配置 CLI 即可开始采集 AI Agent 会话数据，详见 [entireio/cli](https://github.com/entireio/cli)。 ### 使用 Docker 一键运行 推荐使用 Docker Compose 快速启动前后端与数据库，无需本地安装 Java、Node 或 MySQL。 1. **克隆仓库**： ```bash git clone https://github.com/sunmh207/entire-dashboard.git cd entire-dashboard ``` 2. **启动服务**： ```bash docker compose up -d ``` 3. **访问看板**：在浏览器打开 [http://localhost:81](http://localhost:81)。 4. **登录**：默认账号为 `admin`，默认密码为 `admin`。 ## 🚀 Quick Start (Usage) Once the system is up and running: 1. Go to **Repositories**, add a repository, and sync its data. 2. Visit **Overview / Checkpoints** to explore your synced data. ## 📸 Screenshots

The dashboard provides a comprehensive view of your AI agent sessions, showing checkpoint history, commit activity, and repository statistics at a glance.

# Entire Dashboard A web-based analytics and visualization dashboard for data generated by [`entireio/cli`](https://github.com/entireio/cli). **Supported platforms:** GitLab, GitHub, and Gitee. ### System Architecture

Overall workflow: capturing conversations and events from the CLI, processing and storing them in MySQL through the core service, then visual analysis through the Dashboard. ## 🔧 Installation & Run ### 0. Install Entire CLI This dashboard relies on data generated by Entire CLI. Please install Entire CLI from [official website](https://entire.io/home) first: ```bash curl -fsSL https://entire.io/install.sh | bash ``` After installation, configure the CLI in your target repository to start capturing AI Agent session data. For details, see [entireio/cli](https://github.com/entireio/cli). ### Run with Docker Recommended: Use Docker Compose to quickly start the frontend, backend, and database without installing Java, Node, or MySQL locally. 1. **Clone the repository**: ```bash git clone https://github.com/sunmh207/entire-dashboard.git cd entire-dashboard ``` 2. **Start services**: ```bash docker compose up -d ``` 3. **Access dashboard**: Open [http://localhost:81](http://localhost:81) in your browser. 4. **Login**: Default username is `admin`, default password is `admin`. ## 🚀 Quick Start (Usage) Once the system is up and running: 1. Go to **Repositories**, add a repository, and sync its data. 2. Visit **Overview / Checkpoints** to explore your synced data. ## 📸 Screenshots

The dashboard provides a comprehensive view of your AI agent sessions, showing checkpoint history, commit activity, and repository statistics at a glance.

input.newString:
This dashboard relies on data generated by Entire CLI. Please install Entire CLI from [official website](https://entire.io/home) first:

```bash
curl -fsSL https://entire.io/install.sh | bash
```

After installation, configure the CLI in your target repository to start capturing AI Agent session data. For details, see [entireio/cli](https://github.com/entireio/cli).

### Run with Docker

Recommended: Use Docker Compose to quickly start the frontend, backend, and database without installing Java, Node, or MySQL locally.

1. **Clone the repository**:
   ```bash
   git clone https://github.com/sunmh207/entire-dashboard.git
   cd entire-dashboard
   ```

2. **Start services**:
   ```bash
   docker compose up -d
   ```

3. **Access dashboard**: Open [http://localhost:81](http://localhost:81) in your browser.

4. **Login**: Default username is `admin`, default password is `admin`.

```bash
curl -fsSL https://entire.io/install.sh | bash
```

推荐使用 Docker Compose 快速启动前后端与数据库，无需本地安装 Java、Node 或 MySQL。

1. **克隆仓库**：
   ```bash
   git clone https://github.com/sunmh207/entire-dashboard.git
   cd entire-dashboard
   ```

2. **启动服务**：
   ```bash
   docker compose up -d
   ```

3. **访问看板**：在浏览器打开 [http://localhost:81](http://localhost:81)。

4. **登录**：默认账号为 `admin`，默认密码为 `admin`。
